posts.title: Elon Musk says Soros Organization has taken over Hungary after election results

posts.raw_content:
It's always been too long since I have written a post.  There's always something going on and there is always someone who wants my opinion about something.  If that's not you then block me or ignore this post.  If you don't want this post to be for you then it's absolutely fine for it not to be for you.

Now with that preface out of the way lets talk about America First and Making America Great Again. 

I have and will always stand by the fact that Trump winning in 2016 changed the course of history.  Trump won in 2020 and they tried to kill Trump to stop him from winning in 2024.  Everyone on this site who voted for him helped Trump win and helped save America from the hell that would be Biden V2 or Kamala Harris. Everyone of  us wearing a red hat knows the vilification of supporting an America First agenda. 

None of us are aware of every back door dealing or political posturing  in Washington, much less Iran.  Yet I have read and heard thousands of comments that "Trump has lost it" or "he is owned by Bibi".  For the most part I have been lenient with these comments because we are in a moderately unpopular "war" with Israel as our ally. Iran has shouted Death to America at every crossroad in modern history and the need for us to treat them as someone who would keep their word is acceptable to Trump. 

I wanted this war to be over weeks ago.  We have decimated every offensive military force that they employ.  I trust Trump to do what is needed to finish this military action and it is my hope that this action will be completed soon.  

Now to this site:

There have been two recent ideologies employed on this site of recent.  1. Trump has lost his mind and is no longer America First.  He's owned by the Jews.  2.  This site is only Trump first and regardless of anything else happening in the world or in America we follow Trump.

We have in the past broken from Trump's opinions.  You can stab me and get my unvaccinated blood. You can think the first lady of France may be a man.  You can think Lindsey Graham is a terrible choice for a member of Congress. 

This site is the last bastion in the world where you can support Trump and America First and this will not change.  We are not going to update the rules to allow open Trump hating and we will be enforcing any overt anti Trump rhetoric with due diligence. There is no quarter for those who would have rather had an auto pen owned by Soros in office. 

We are America First, we will Make America Great Again even if I have to do it all myself while holding pepe's hand.
